name: MONEYGRAM BRANCH
description_short: MoneyGram agent location at Tax Solutions Express LLC offering money transfer, check cashing, and bill payment services at 1208 Brooklyn Ave in Kansas City, Missouri.
description_long:
MoneyGram is a global money transfer service that operates through a network of agent locations, including this branch co-located with Tax Solutions Express LLC in Kansas City. The company specializes in enabling consumers to send and receive money conveniently, with a focus on accessible, in-person transaction options. This particular location serves the Kansas City market by providing MoneyGram services at a physical address, allowing customers to conduct transactions either in-person or online through MoneyGram's digital platform. The MoneyGram network has established itself as one of the largest money transfer operators in the United States, with thousands of agent locations nationwide.

At this Tax Solutions Express LLC location, customers can access core MoneyGram services including sending money nationwide, receiving money transfers, and conducting related financial transactions. The location emphasizes convenience and accessibility, operating as a physical point of service where customers can walk in to complete transfers without relying solely on digital channels. The website highlights the ability to find locations easily through their map-based search tool and encourages both online and in-person transaction preferences. Services appear to include standard money transfer capabilities with nationwide reach.

This MoneyGram agent location distinguishes itself through its co-location with Tax Solutions Express LLC, suggesting a partnership that may appeal to customers seeking multiple financial services in one location. The listing on MoneyGram's official location finder provides visibility and credibility as an authorized agent. The emphasis on "convenient location" and flexible transaction methods (online or in-person) positions this as an accessible option for consumers who prefer face-to-face service interactions.

Consumers should understand that this is an agent location rather than a MoneyGram-owned branch, meaning service quality and hours may vary based on Tax Solutions Express LLC's operations. The website content is minimal and does not provide specific details about fees, exchange rates, transfer speeds, or hours of operation. Customers should verify current services and pricing directly with the location before visiting.
pros: Nationwide money transfer network with established presence and reliability
Flexible transaction options—customers can send/receive money online or in person
Physical location at 1208 Brooklyn Ave provides in-person service option in Kansas City
Easy location finder using map, address, city, state, or ZIP search on website
Co-located with Tax Solutions Express LLC, potentially offering complementary services
No requirement to open an account—accessible to unbanked and underbanked consumers
cons: Agent location rather than company-owned branch—service quality depends on Tax Solutions Express LLC operations
Website provides no information about fees, exchange rates, or transfer speeds
Hours of operation not listed on MoneyGram website for this specific location
Limited details about services offered at this particular branch—must contact directly
No pricing transparency or comparison tools visible on the provided website content
best_for: Consumers needing to send money to family or friends nationwide
Unbanked and underbanked individuals who prefer in-person transactions
People seeking quick money transfer without opening a bank account
Kansas City residents needing a nearby physical location for money services
diagnosis: This MoneyGram location is best for consumers needing domestic money transfers or basic financial services who prefer or require in-person transactions at a physical location. The main caveat is that this is an agent location, not a company-owned branch, so actual service availability, hours, and fees depend on Tax Solutions Express LLC's operations—customers should contact the location directly to confirm current services and pricing before visiting.
